text.title: Programmatic SEO Patterns Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion comparison-page program: 95% data quality on internal DB, refresh 30d, 2 templates (vs + list), 300/2 thresholds, 3-tier indexability, owner seo-lead@faion.net.
example.note: All five rules satisfied; tier 1 ready to ship.
